# Changelog ŌĆö `devPTIpack` Refactoring

> Each entry logs a discrete change made during the architecture redesign.
> Format: date, scope, and one-line summary of what changed and why.

---

## 2026-04-29

| Scope | Change                                                                                                                                           |
| ----- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| Docs  | Created `.github/docs/arch-00-overview.md` ŌĆö legacy architecture map                                                                             |
| Docs  | Created `.github/docs/arch-01-cleanup.md` ŌĆö function-by-function removal plan (6 batches)                                                        |
| Docs  | Created `.github/docs/arch-02-docs.md` ŌĆö documentation implementation order                                                                      |
| Rules | Created `.claude/rules/roxygen-documentation.md` ŌĆö roxygen2 templates and required fields                                                        |
| Rules | Created `.claude/CLAUDE.md` ŌĆö project context and conventions for AI agents                                                                      |
| Docs  | Added "Permanent Functions" audit to `arch-01-cleanup.md` ŌĆö visibility (39 exported / ~56 internal) and doc quality for all ~95 active functions |
| Docs  | Fixed spelling/formatting in `arch-00-overview.md` workflow steps 1ŌĆō7                                                                            |

## 2026-05-01

| Scope   | Change                                                                                                                                          |
| ------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Docs    | Rewrote `PLAN.md` as a thin tracker that defers to `.github/docs/` and the GitHub issues; replaced stale pre-redesign content                   |
| Tooling | Created `.claude/skills/tdd-permanent-fn/SKILL.md` ŌĆö scaffolds Tier-1 testthat files for permanent functions per arch-03 / arch-02.01           |
| Tooling | Created `.claude/skills/cleanup-batch/SKILL.md` ŌĆö executes one numbered cleanup batch from arch-01 with pre-flight, tests, check, smoke-test    |
| Tooling | Created `.claude/skills/roxygen-document/SKILL.md` ŌĆö adds/upgrades roxygen2 per the rules file with template selection and example verification |
| Tooling | Created `.claude/skills/issue-progress-comment/SKILL.md` ŌĆö drafts confirmation-gated progress comments for #8/#10/#11/#12/#13                   |
| Tooling | Created `.claude/agents/r-package-reviewer.md` sub-agent for read-only diff review of NAMESPACE, roxygen, debug artefacts, and R CMD check      |
| Tooling | Created `.claude/hooks/auto-changelog.sh` Stop hook that auto-drafts changelog rows from the uncommitted diff and is idempotent across reruns   |
| Tooling | Created `.claude/settings.json` to register the auto-changelog Stop hook for both collaborators                                                 |
| Tooling | Updated `.claude/CLAUDE.md` to document the new integration branch (`koichi-arch-redesign`), the skills/sub-agent table, and the hook behaviour |
| Config  | Added `.claude/` and `PLAN.md` to `.Rbuildignore` so they don't ship with the package build                                                     |
| Config  | Added `.claude/settings.local.json` to `.gitignore` so machine-local permissions stay out of the repo                                           |
| Code    | Added `R/run_pti_pipeline.R` exporting `run_pti_pipeline()` ŌĆö Shiny-free orchestrator for the seven-step calc pipeline (issue #10 deliverable 1) |
| Tests   | Added `tests/testthat/helper-test-data.R` providing bundled data plus deterministic pipeline intermediates for Tier-1 tests                     |
| Tests   | Added `tests/testthat/test-calc-pipeline.R` ŌĆö first batch of Tier-1 cases for `get_mt`/`get_adm_levels`/`clean_geoms`/`pivot_pti_dta`/`get_weighted_data`/`get_scores_data` plus end-to-end via `run_pti_pipeline()`, pinning the lexicographic-sort and 1-row-NA quirks per arch-03 |
| Config  | Regenerated `NAMESPACE` to export `run_pti_pipeline`; bumped `RoxygenNote` to 7.3.3 as a side-effect of `roxygen2::roxygenise()`                |
| Tests   | Extended `helper-test-data.R` with `test_expanded` and `test_merged` so downstream Tier-1 tests don't each rebuild the expand/merge pipeline    |
| Tests   | Added Level A.7 + A.8 cases to `test-calc-pipeline.R` covering `expand_adm_levels` and `merge_expandedn_adm_levels`; pins the >1-element-match short-circuit and the missing-`year` error per arch-02.01 |
| Tests   | Extended `helper-test-data.R` with `test_extrap` (multi-scheme expand+merge) and `test_aggregated` so A.10/A.11 don't each rebuild the chain  |
| Tests   | Added Level A.9 cases to `test-calc-pipeline.R` covering `agg_pti_scores` ŌĆö output shape, scheme row-binding, spatial_name lookup, NA propagation under both `na_rm_pti2 = FALSE/TRUE`, all-NA-row zero-sum behaviour, and NA-Pcod row dropping |
| Tests   | Added Level A.10 cases (`label_generic_pti` + `generic_pti_glue`) covering glue-class output, HTML structure, NA -> "No data" rendering, 5-decimal score formatting, and list-shape preservation |
| Tests   | Added Level A.11 cases (`structure_pti_data`) covering output slots, `pti_codes` mapping, wide pivot to `pti_score..pti_ind_N`, row-count-preserving geometry join, the synthetic "No data" filler for missing (Pcod, scheme) combos, and admin_level extraction from shape list names |
| Tests   | Added Level B integration tests ŌĆö one per adjacent-stage pair (pivot->weight->score->expand->merge->agg->label->structure) so contracts between stages are pinned in addition to the orchestrator-level checks |
| Tooling | Added "PLAN.md Sync (COMPULSORY)" section to `.claude/CLAUDE.md` ŌĆö every PR that touches tracked work updates `PLAN.md` in the same commit                                                            |
| Tooling | Added a final "Sync `PLAN.md`" step to the `tdd-permanent-fn`, `cleanup-batch`, and `roxygen-document` skills so tick-off is part of the workflow, not an afterthought                                |
| Docs    | Synced `PLAN.md`: marked 1a-1c complete, expanded 1e with a per-file checklist, resolved ┬¦3.1 and ┬¦3.2 (branch + skills shipped), pruned answered ┬¦9 questions, added a ┬¦11 "Progress log" of merged PRs |
| Tests   | Added `tests/testthat/test-validators.R` (1e bullet 1) ŌĆö Tier-1 tests for `validate_single_geom`, `validate_geometries`, `validate_read_shp`, `validate_read_metadata`, `validate_metadata`. Includes a `capture_validator()` helper that mocks the validators' internal `testthat::test_that` calls so their inner expectation failures don't pollute the outer suite; pins the pre-existing empty-pattern `str_detect` bug in `validate_read_shp` (refactor will land via #7) |
| Docs    | `PLAN.md` ticked the validators item under ┬¦4.1 1e and logged PR #20 in ┬¦11; suite total updated to 450 expectations |
| Tests   | Added `tests/testthat/test-template-reader.R` (1e bullet 2) ŌĆö covers `fct_template_reader` (sheet structure, fltr_* logical coercion, NULL `weights_clean` when no `weights_table` sheet, var_code filtering), `fct_convert_weight_to_clean` (synthetic `wsN..*` columns), `get_shape` (all three branches), and `create_new_pti` (template scaffolding into a tempdir with `open = FALSE` and stdout silenced) |
| Docs    | `PLAN.md` ticked template-reader under ┬¦4.1 1e and logged PR #21 in ┬¦11; suite total updated to 478 expectations |
| Tests   | Added `tests/testthat/test-indicators-list.R` (1e bullet 3) ŌĆö covers `get_indicators_list` happy path, column schema, var_code uniqueness, nested `admin_levels_years` shape, the `fltr_exclude_pti` filter, alternative `fltr_var` arg, and a PINNED error on a non-existent fltr_var |
| Tests   | Removed legacy placeholder `tests/testthat/test-get_indicators_list.R` (a 6-line tautology `expect_gt(2*2, 3)`) ŌĆö superseded by the new `test-indicators-list.R` |
| Docs    | `PLAN.md` ticked indicators-list under ┬¦4.1 1e and logged PR #22 in ┬¦11; suite total updated to 507 expectations |
| Tests   | Added `tests/testthat/test-drop-inval-adm.R` (1e bullet 4) ŌĆö covers `get_vars_un_avbil` (output shape + explicit admin_levels arg), `get_min_admin_wght` (zero-weight / fully-available / weighting-an-unavailable-var / multi-scheme), and `drop_inval_adm` (empty drops, scheme+admin match, drop-everything) |
| Docs    | `PLAN.md` ticked drop-inval-adm under ┬¦4.1 1e and logged PR #23 in ┬¦11; suite total updated to 523 expectations |
| Tests   | Added `tests/testthat/test-legend-palette.R` (1e bullet 5) ŌĆö output schema, factor-vs-continuous-branch behaviour, single-unique-value, binary, NA -> "No data", `legend_revert_colours` flip, plus full `recode_val_base` coverage including the single-break patch and NA->no_data_label semantics. Pins arch-03 ┬¦1.5 spec corrections (the input `c(1,5,3,7,2)` takes the integer branch, not the continuous branch the doc assumed) |
| Docs    | `PLAN.md` ticked legend-palette under ┬¦4.1 1e and logged PR #24 in ┬¦11; suite total updated to 542 expectations |
| Tests   | Added `tests/testthat/test-plot-helpers.R` (1e bullet 6) ŌĆö covers `preplot_reshape_wghtd_dta`, `get_current_levels`, `filter_admin_levels`, `add_legend_paras`, `complete_pti_labels`, `check_existing_groups`. Pinned 2 newly-discovered bugs (`complete_pti_labels` no-op missing assignment; `check_existing_groups` errors on empty `old_grps`) and 1 spec asymmetry (`filter_admin_levels` enters by name, filters by value) |
| Docs    | `PLAN.md` ticked plot-helpers under ┬¦4.1 1e, logged PR #25, added a new ┬¦12 "Discovered bugs" table consolidating bugs surfaced while writing Tier-1 tests; suite total updated to 615 expectations |
| Tests   | Added `tests/testthat/test-export.R` (1e bullet 7) ŌĆö covers `get_pti_scores_export` (per-admin tibble shape, ' PTI Scores' suffix, geometry/label/area dropped, per-scheme Score+Priority columns), `get_pti_weights_export` (row count, var_code drop + Variable/Pillar rename, per-scheme Weights columns), `fct_internal_wt_to_exp` (long shape, row count = vars*schemes, empty scheme tibble -> 0 rows), `fct_inp_for_exp` (general/admin/metadata structure, Pcod columns dropped, indicators renamed by var_name, fltr_* dropped from metadata). Pinned a new bug: `fct_internal_wt_to_exp(list())` errors at the downstream `left_join` because `imap_dfr(list())` produces a 0x0 tibble |
| Docs    | `PLAN.md` ticked export under ┬¦4.1 1e, logged PR #26, added the empty-list-errors bug to ┬¦12; suite total updated to 673 expectations |
| Tests   | Added `tests/testthat/test-explorer-helpers.R` (1e bullet 8) ŌĆö covers `reshaped_explorer_dta` (per-admin tibble shape, generic pti_* columns, glue-class HTML labels, var_name resolution), `get_var_choices` (nested-by-pillar list shape, var_name -> var_code mapping), `filter_var_explorer` (value match, names(vars) match, no match, empty input). Pinned a new bug: `get_var_choices(empty_tibble)` errors with 'attempt to set an attribute on NULL' because the fallback branch tries to name a NULL output |
| Docs    | `PLAN.md` ticked explorer-helpers under ┬¦4.1 1e, logged PR #27, added the new `get_var_choices` empty bug to ┬¦12; suite total updated to 700 expectations |
| Tests   | Added `tests/testthat/test-map-render.R` (1e bullet 9) ŌĆö class-assertion coverage for the non-interactive renderers: `make_ggmap` (default + no-shp_dta + show_interval branches), `make_gg_line_map`, `plot_leaf_line_map2` (NULL show_adm_levels and explicit subset). These return ggplot/leaflet objects whose internal state isn't easily assertable in Tier 1; deeper coverage stays in Tier 3 |
| Docs    | `PLAN.md` ticked map-render under ┬¦4.1 1e, logged PR #28; suite total updated to 708 expectations |
| Tests   | Added `tests/testthat/test-dt-construction.R` (1e bullet 10) ŌĆö covers `prep_input_data` (column schema, pillar+variable row count, numericInput HTML in variable rows), `make_vis_targets_for_dt` (columnDefs+colnames shape, var_name+ui visible vs invisible mapping), `make_input_DT` (returns dt_out + nested_dta list, dt_out is a DT htmlwidget). Pinned arch-03 ┬¦1.11 spec correction: row count is `#pillars + #indicators`, not just `#indicators` |
| Docs    | `PLAN.md` ticked dt-construction under ┬¦4.1 1e and the outer 1e box (1e complete!), logged PR #29, expanded the Phase 1 ASCII tree to surface the next sub-items (1f CI, 1g Tier 2); suite total updated to 725 expectations |

## 2026-05-02

| Scope   | Change                                                                                                                                          |
| ------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Config  | Added `.github/workflows/tests.yaml` (1f) ŌĆö runs `testthat::test_local()` on push/PR to main and koichi-arch-redesign via r-lib/actions v2. Local suite ~30s, well under arch-03's 2-min budget |
| Docs    | `PLAN.md` ticked 1f, updated the Phase 1 tree to mark 1g as next, logged PR #30                                                                  |
| Tests   | Added `tests/testthat/test-mod-calc-pti2.R` (1g first module) ŌĆö Tier-2 `shiny::testServer` coverage for `mod_calc_pti2_server`: happy path (admin-keyed slots), all-zero weights -> 0 scores, single-indicator weight list, identical-input dedup, weight-change recompute. Notes the multi-admin-only constraint pinned in PLAN.md ┬¦12 (single-admin indicators trip the expand_adm_levels NULL short-circuit) |
| Docs    | `PLAN.md` expanded 1g into a 7-bullet checklist (one per module), ticked the first module, logged PR #31; suite total 725 -> 792 expectations |
| Tests   | Added `tests/testthat/test-mod-DT-inputs.R` (1g second module) ŌĆö Tier-2 `shiny::testServer` coverage for `mod_DT_inputs_server`: initial-render shape (all `var_code` rows, weights `NA_real_`), direct numericInput change ŌåÆ `current_values()`, all-zero + all-one button paths (round-trip simulated via `setInputs` because `updateNumericInput` does not propagate back to `input[[id]]` in `MockShinySession`), `update_dta()` push, and the 500ms throttle window. 6 `test_that` blocks / 13 expectations; full local suite passes |
| Docs    | `PLAN.md` ticked `mod_DT_inputs_server` under ┬¦4.1 1g (2/7 modules covered), bumped Phase-1 ASCII tree to "in progress (2/7)", logged PR #33, and added a ┬¦11 footnote explaining the suite-total recount: prior `sum(res$nb)` totals (725, 792) over-counted internal `testthat::test_that()` calls inside `validate_geometries()` / `validate_single_geom()`; the summary-reporter `PASS` figure (now 612) is the source of truth going forward |
| Tests   | Added `tests/testthat/test-mod-drop-inval-adm.R` (1g third module) ŌĆö Tier-2 `shiny::testServer` coverage for `mod_drop_inval_adm` per arch-03 ┬¦2.3: no-drops happy path (output identical to input), indicator missing at admin1 ŌåÆ admin1 dropped, `shiny::showNotification` fires on drop (intercepted via `testthat::local_mocked_bindings(.package = "shiny")`), notification suppressed when nothing is dropped, and weight-0 indicator does not trigger a drop. 5 `test_that` blocks / 10 expectations; uses synthetic minimal inputs (one indicator, two admin slots) so each test surgically controls whether a drop is required |
| Docs    | `PLAN.md` ticked `mod_drop_inval_adm` under ┬¦4.1 1g (3/7 modules covered), bumped Phase-1 ASCII tree to "in progress (3/7)", added ┬¦12 entry pinning the `get_vars_un_avbil` fill-direction asymmetry (admin1-only indicators are treated as available at admin2 because the lag-fill propagates DOWN from earlier-sorted admin levels ŌĆö also flagged the `is.na(value & !any_larger)` paren oddity); logged this PR; suite total updated to 622 PASS |
| Config  | Added `.claude/scheduled_tasks.lock` to `.gitignore` ŌĆö runtime artefact created by `ScheduleWakeup`; should never enter git or the changelog (it had auto-drafted a noisy row in PR #34's range) |
| Docs    | Replaced two `TBD` placeholders in `PLAN.md` (┬¦4.1 1g `mod_drop_inval_adm` bullet + ┬¦11 progress-log row) with `#34` now that the PR is merged |
| Tests   | Added `tests/testthat/test-mod-admin-levels.R` (1g fourth module) ŌĆö Tier-2 `shiny::testServer` coverage for `mod_get_admin_levels_srv` per arch-03 ┬¦2.4: no-filter passthrough, `default_adm_level` resolved by admin-key match / display-value match / "All" (case-insensitive) / non-match (ŌåÆ last element only), `show_adm_levels` filtering by name and value, single non-matching `show_adm_levels` (ŌåÆ last element), `default_adm_level` precedence over `show_adm_levels`, and update on `cur_levels` reactive change. 11 `test_that` blocks / 12 expectations |
| Docs    | `PLAN.md` ticked `mod_get_admin_levels_srv` under ┬¦4.1 1g (4/7 modules covered), bumped Phase-1 ASCII tree to "in progress (4/7)", logged PR #36; suite total updated to 634 PASS |
| Tests   | Added `tests/testthat/test-mod-var-selector.R` (1g fifth module) ŌĆö Tier-2 `shiny::testServer` coverage for `mod_fltr_sel_var2_srv` per arch-03 ┬¦2.5: initial `updatePickerInput` populates display-name choices (intercepted via `testthat::local_mocked_bindings(.package = "shinyWidgets")`), setting `input$indicators` runs the 500ms-debounced filter through `filter_var_explorer()`, switching the selection swaps which admin slots survive, `first_open(TRUE)` auto-selects the first display name, `add_selected()` override fires `updatePickerInput` (single-var-per-pillar happy path). Bug pin (┬¦12): the `add_selected` observer's `purrr::map_lgl(., ~ .x %in% c(...))` predicate errors with "Result must be length 1, not N" when any pillar holds >1 variable; pinned via the underlying predicate expression rather than via `expect_error` around `testServer` (Shiny captures observeEvent errors through its stack-trace machinery and neither `expect_error` nor `expect_warning` reliably catches them). 7 `test_that` blocks / 18 expectations |
| Docs    | `PLAN.md` ticked `mod_fltr_sel_var2_srv` under ┬¦4.1 1g (5/7 modules covered), bumped Phase-1 ASCII tree to "in progress (5/7)", swapped the leftover `TBD` for PR #36, logged PR #37, suite total updated to 652 PASS, added ┬¦12 row pinning the `purrr::map_lgl` length-1 violation |
| Tests   | Added `tests/testthat/test-mod-wt-save.R` (1g sixth module) ŌĆö Tier-2 `shiny::testServer` coverage for `mod_wt_save_newsrv` per arch-03 ┬¦2.6: save-new with empty storage, overwrite by same name, save-new alongside an existing scheme; button-UI label and disabled state for "Save and plot new PTI" (new name + non-zero weights), "Provide a name" (empty name), "Modify weights" (all-zero weights), "No changes to save" (matching name + identical weights), "Save changes and plot PTI" (matching name + changed weights). UI assertions read the internal `current_btn_ui()` reactiveVal directly from `expr` scope (renderUI side effect). 8 `test_that` blocks / 17 expectations. arch-03 ┬¦2.6's "Delete scheme" case actually targets `mod_wt_delete_newsrv` (separate permanent function, not on the 1g checklist) ŌĆö out of scope here |
| Docs    | `PLAN.md` ticked `mod_wt_save_newsrv` under ┬¦4.1 1g (6/7 modules covered), bumped Phase-1 ASCII tree to "in progress (6/7)", swapped the leftover `TBD` for PR #37, logged PR #38, suite total updated to 669 PASS |
| Tests   | Added `tests/testthat/test-mod-export-data.R` (1g seventh and final module) ŌĆö Tier-2 `shiny::testServer` coverage for `mod_export_pti_data_server` per arch-03 ┬¦2.7: returned named list shape (`Country` + `Weighting schemes` + per-admin scores), `Country` slot mirrors `weights_dta()$general`, "Weighting schemes" tibble has the right columns including one `"Weights - <scheme>"` column per scheme, per-admin score slots end in `" PTI Scores"` and are reversed (finer admin first), and `req()` halts when `plotted_dta()` is NULL. Synthetic minimal inputs ŌĆö the wrapper does no calc work itself so realistic shapes for `get_pti_scores_export` / `get_pti_weights_export` are sufficient. 6 `test_that` blocks / 13 expectations |
| Docs    | **Phase 1 (#10) complete.** `PLAN.md` ticked `mod_export_pti_data_server` under ┬¦4.1 1g (7/7 modules ŌĆö all of 1g), bumped 1g checkbox to `[x]`, flipped Phase-1 status from "in progress" to "Ō£ō done" in both the ASCII tree and the inline summary, swapped the leftover `TBD` for PR #38, logged PR #39, suite total updated to 682 PASS, and pointed to Phase 2 (arch-01 cleanup batches) as the next track |
| Code    | **Phase 2 Batch 1 ŌĆö dead-code purge** (arch-01). Deleted 4 whole legacy files: `R/fct_export_data.R` (the orphaned `rename_one`/`prepare_tibble_to_export`/`prepare_DT_export`/`dt_wrap_exported` chain), `R/mod_explorer.R` (superseded by `mod_dta_explorer2.R`), `R/mod_info_page.R` (superseded by `mod_infotab.R`), `R/mod_calc_pti.R` (superseded by `mod_calc_pti2.R`). Suite stays green at 682 PASS ŌĆö no regressions |

Promoted `gg_admin_list()` from `@describeIn` to a standalone roxygen block since its parent (`plot_admin_level_ggmap`) was deleted |
| Data    | Deleted `data/ukr_mtdt_nodata_level.rda` ŌĆö undocumented orphan with zero references in R/ or data-raw/ |
| Code    | Cleaned up commented-out `do.call(make_spplot, ...)` / `do.call(make_ggmap_2, ...)` / `do.call(make_sp_line_map, ...)` / `do.call(make_gg_line_map_2, ...)` lines in `mod_pti_map_side_pan.R` (formerly L338ŌĆō346 and L432ŌĆō440) since the called functions are now deleted |
| Config  | `roxygen2::roxygenise()` regenerated `NAMESPACE` (removed `extrapo_one_weight`, `fct_exp_wt_to_internal`, `mod_weights_html_ui` plus 9 other exports tied to deleted functions) and refreshed Rd files (deleted `mod_plot_poly_leaf_server_ui.Rd`, regenerated `mod_new_demo_weights_server.Rd` / `mod_plot_poly_leaf_server.Rd` / `mod_weights_ui.Rd`) |
| Config  | Fixed pre-existing DESCRIPTION error blocking `R CMD check`: wrapped `Authors@R`'s three `person()` calls in `c(...)` (so DCF parses all three, not just the last), and added explicit `Author:` / `Maintainer:` fields. Folded into Batch 1 because without it `R CMD check` halts before any cleanup-relevant checks run, so the batch's check-clean claim couldn't be verified otherwise |
| Docs    | `PLAN.md` ticked Phase-2 Batch 1 box, swapped the leftover `TBD` for PR #39, added a ┬¦11 progress-log row for this PR. Suite stays at 682 PASS (cleanup-only, no test delta) |
| Code    | **Phase 2 Batch 2 ŌĆö legacy runners + their backends** (arch-01). Deleted whole file `R/mod_pti_onepage.R` (both `mod_pti_onepage_ui` + `mod_pti_onepage_server` ŌĆö only callers were `run_onepage_pti*`, also removed in this batch). Trimmed `R/run_app.R` to keep only `run_new_pti` (deleted `run_pti`, `run_onepage_pti`, `run_onepage_pti_sample`, `run_dev_map_pti`, `run_dev_pti_plot` ŌĆö all zero-caller in package code; `dev/` references are slated for deletion in arch-04 Phase 4). | Config  | `roxygen2::roxygenise()` regenerated `NAMESPACE` (removed 7 exports: `mod_pti_onepage_ui`, `mod_pti_onepage_server`, `run_pti`, `run_onepage_pti`, `run_onepage_pti_sample`, `run_dev_map_pti`, `run_dev_pti_plot`) and rewrote `man/run_new_pti.Rd` + `man/app_new_pti_ui.Rd` to drop the `@describeIn` sections from the deleted siblings. No orphan `.Rd` files to delete (the deleted runners and the onepage UI/server were `@describeIn` children, merged into their parent's man page) |
| Docs    | `PLAN.md` ticked Phase-2 Batch 2 box under ┬¦5, swapped the leftover `TBD` for PR #40 on the Batch 1 row in ┬¦11, and added a ┬¦11 progress-log row for this PR. Suite stays at 682 PASS (cleanup-only, no test delta) |
| Docs    | Replaced three `TBD` / `PR TBD` placeholders in `PLAN.md` (┬¦5 Batch 1 + ┬¦5 Batch 2 + ┬¦11 Batch 2 progress-log row) with `#40` / `#41` now that both PRs are merged |
| Code    | **Phase 2 Batch 3 ŌĆö extract `mod_map_pti_leaf_ui`, remove legacy map server** (arch-01). New file `R/mod_map_pti_leaf_ui.R` holds the extracted `mod_map_pti_leaf_ui` (the kept UI used by `mod_pti_comparepage_ui`, `mod_weights_ui`, and `mod_ptipage_core.R` ├Ś2). Deleted whole file `R/mod_map_pti_leaf.R` (1258 lines) ŌĆö all 12 legacy server functions go: `mod_map_pti_leaf_srv`, `mod_map_pti_leaf_page_ui`, `mod_map_pti_leaf_page_srv`, `mod_init_leaf_pti_srv`, `mod_flyto_leaf_srv`, `mod_clean_leaf_srv`, `mod_map_pal_srv`, `mod_map_dta_srv`, `mod_plot_map_srv`, `mod_plot_controls_srv`, `mod_plot_legend_srv`, `mod_clean_buble_data_srv`. Suite stays green at 682 PASS ŌĆö no regressions |

Out-of-arch-01 mini-patch folded in to avoid an undefined-symbol note from `R CMD check` for `app_new_pti_ui` (Batch-4 territory but the alternative was leaving `mod_map_pti_leaf_page_ui` undeleted, which violates the Batch 3 table) |

## 2026-05-03

| Scope  | Change |
| ------ | ------ |
| Code   | **Phase 2 Batch 4 ŌĆö migrate sample app to `launch_pti()` and remove legacy app entrypoint** (arch-01). Rewrote `inst/sample_pti/app.R` (the deployed sample app) to load shapes via `devPTIpack::get_shape()` and metadata via `devPTIpack::fct_template_reader()`, then call `devPTIpack::launch_pti()` directly. Drops the `default_adm_level` / `choose_adm_levels` / `explorer_choose_adm` / `explorer_default_adm` / `explorer_multiple_var` / `full_ui` / `pti_landing_page` knobs that have no equivalent in `launch_pti()`'s signature; preserving them would require extending `launch_pti()` (separate PR, out of arch-01 scope). The Info tab is now rendered by the modern `mod_infotab_server` rather than `mod_info_page_server` reading `landing-page.md` |
| Code   | Deleted `run_new_pti()` (whole file `R/run_app.R` removed via `git rm`) ŌĆö only caller was the legacy `inst/sample_pti/app.R` rewritten above |
| Code   | Deleted `app_new_pti_server()` (whole file `R/app_server.R` removed via `git rm` since `app_new_pti_server` was its sole content after Batch 2) ŌĆö only caller was `run_new_pti` deleted in this batch |
| Code   | Deleted `app_new_pti_ui()` from `R/app_ui.R` ŌĆö kept only `golem_add_external_resources()` (still used by `launch_pti_onepage` / `launch_pti` and the modern module pipeline). Only caller of `app_new_pti_ui` was `run_new_pti` |
| Code   | Deleted `mod_plot_pti_comparison_srv()` from `R/mod_plot_pti2.R` ŌĆö thin `@describeIn` wrapper around two `mod_plot_pti2_srv` calls; only caller was `app_new_pti_server` deleted in this batch. Modern compare page uses `mod_pti_comparepage_newsrv` instead |
| Config | `roxygen2::roxygenise()` regenerated `NAMESPACE`. Net effect: dropped 2 `export()` (`run_new_pti`, `app_new_pti_ui`), 1 `import(readr)` bulk-tag (the surviving `read_rds` use in `validate_metadata` is still covered by its own `importFrom(readr,read_rds)`), and 2 unused `importFrom`s (`rlang::dots_list` only used qualified, `shiny::callModule` only in a comment in `mod_load_shapes.R`). Relocated 5 auto-pruned tags whose roxygen lived in deleted files: added `@importFrom shiny shinyApp navbarPage tabPanel` and `@importFrom golem with_golem_options` to `launch_pti_onepage`'s roxygen (used by `launch_pti` / `launch_pti_onepage`); added `reactiveValues` to `mod_wt_inp_ui`'s `@importFrom shiny` line (used by `mod_wt_inp.R`, `mod_infotab.R`, `mod_ptipage_core.R`). Deleted `man/app_new_pti_ui.Rd` + `man/run_new_pti.Rd`; regenerated `man/mod_plot_pti2_srv.Rd` to drop the comparison-srv `@describeIn` section |
| Docs   | `PLAN.md` ticked Phase-2 Batch 4 box under ┬¦5 with a multi-line summary covering the rewrite + deletions + import relocations. Folded in the long-pending Batch 3 `(PR TBD) ŌåÆ (PR #43)` swap on the Batch 3 ┬¦5 row and the leading-`TBD ŌåÆ #43` swap on the Batch 3 ┬¦11 progress-log row (saves a separate chore PR). Added a ┬¦11 progress-log row for this PR. Suite stays at 682 PASS (cleanup-only, no test delta) |
| Code   | Smoke test: `library(cicerone) + pkgload::load_all() + launch_pti(shp_dta=ukr_shp, inp_dta=ukr_mtdt_full)` returns a `shiny.appobj` cleanly, and the rewritten `inst/sample_pti/app.R` builds the same when sourced from `inst/sample_pti/`. The `cicerone` library preload is still needed because `launch_pti` itself calls `use_cicerone()` unqualified (lines 144, 163) ŌĆö pre-existing import gap not in scope for this batch |
